title: Dispatch-model discovery tool surface
description: list-dispatch-models / discover-agent-models Pi tool querying ExtensionContext's model registry returning {provider, modelId, contextWindow, capabilities}. scripts/orchestrator/list-dispatch-models.ts CLI dual-surface per DEC-0019/0020. Closes FB-007 (FGAP-158).
acceptance_criteria: Pi tool list-dispatch-models registered in pi-agent-dispatch (or pi-jit-agents per DEC scope)
Returns structured list of valid provider/modelId combinations sourced from ExtensionContext
Orchestrator can resolve model strings without trial-and-error
